Examples: Marriage, Divorce, Birth or adoption of child, Purchase of a new home, Retirement, Filing chapter 11 bankruptcy
You or your spouse start or stop working, or start or stop a second job

Factor: Change in the amount of taxable income not subject to withholding
Examples: Interest income, Dividends, Capital gains, Self-employment income, IRA (including certain Roth IRA) distributions

Factor: Change in the amount of adjustments to income
Examples: IRA deduction, Student loan interest deduction, Alimony expense

Factor: Change in the amount of itemized deductions or tax credits
Examples: Medical expenses, Taxes, Interest expense, Gifts to charity, Dependent care expenses, Education credit, Child tax credit, Earned income credit
